subject: Update documentation for Go gemini-slave
description:
Update documentation files to reflect Go implementation:

1. Update `~/.claude/agents/gemini-slave/gemini-slave.md`:
   - Note that wrapper is now Go-native
   - Document stdin handling guarantees
   - Update invocation examples

2. Update `GEMINI-SLAVE-DEBUG-SUMMARY.md`:
   - Mark as RESOLVED
   - Document root cause (bash timing race)
   - Document solution (Go io.ReadAll)

3. Update `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` (if it references gemini-slave):
   - Update any bash-specific notes
   - Note Go implementation path

4. Add README.md in cmd/gemini-slave/:
   - Brief description
   - Build instructions
   - Test instructions
   - Protocol reference
